name: session-id
description: SessionStart hook that writes the Claude Code session ID to ~/.claude/session_id

interface.shortDescription: Persist session ID across context resets
interface.longDescription: Bento Session ID installs a SessionStart hook that captures the Claude Code session ID on every session start, resume, and context reset, writing it to ~/.claude/session_id and creating a per-session scratch directory at /tmp/claude-session-<id>/. This makes the session ID available to the model and to shell commands throughout the session.
defaultPrompt: What is the current session ID?
